Work

Flexible Workspaces for Builders & Creators

Whether you need a private desk or a shared co-working environment, The Green Shed gives you the space and infrastructure to do your best work.

  • Private desks — dedicated, bookable workspace just for you
  • Shared co-working areas — collaborative, open zones built for focused work
  • Flexible lease terms — from day passes to monthly arrangements
  • Fast internet — reliable high-speed connection for remote teams
  • Warehouse access — open 1000sqm space when you need room to move

About

A Space Built for Growth

The Green Shed is a 1000sqm warehouse in Byron Bay designed to give small businesses the room they need to grow. Whether you're a startup looking for your first real office, a tradie who needs somewhere secure to store equipment, or an e-commerce brand scaling its fulfilment — this is your base.

Practical, affordable, and without the overheads of a traditional commercial space. The Green Shed is for people who'd rather spend time building their business than managing their workspace.

Entrepreneurs Creatives Trades E-commerce Remote Workers Small Business
